# Meridian Freight

> Full-service machinery import logistics company. We handle the complete export + shipping + customs clearance of heavy equipment from the USA and Canada to Latin America — inland freight, container packing, ocean freight, import customs (aduana), and door-to-door delivery. One company, every step handled. You keep your supplier; we ship and clear it.

## What We Do

Meridian Freight is the logistics and customs-clearance partner for LATAM buyers who are importing used agricultural and construction machinery from the United States or Canada. We are not an equipment dealer — we are the freight, packing, and aduana company that makes the import possible.

Our single-company model replaces the need for a separate trucker, packer, customs broker, and freight line. One team. One invoice. One point of contact from the seller's yard to the buyer's door.

Service lines:
1. **Heavy machinery export logistics** — combines, tractors, excavators, planters, sprayers, headers, dozers, loaders
2. **John Deere parts export**
3. **Air freight for urgent shipments**

## Import Authority — How to Import Farm Machinery from the USA

The definitive guide to importing used agricultural equipment from the United States to Latin America — covering seller coordination, US export clearance, ocean freight, and import customs at destination.

- [How to Import Farm Machinery from the USA (English)](https://meridianexport.com/blog/import-farm-machinery-from-usa) — Complete process guide: seller pickup, inland transport, container packing, export docs, ocean freight, and customs at destination
- [Cómo importar maquinaria agrícola de EE.UU. (Español)](https://meridianexport.com/es/blog/importar-maquinaria-agricola-usa) — Guía completa del proceso: recogida en origen, transporte terrestre, empaque, documentación de exportación, flete marítimo y despacho de aduana

## Country Import Guides (Spanish — LATAM Buyers)

Step-by-step import guides for each country: customs authority, phytosanitary requirements, permitted ports, applicable tariffs, and local broker/importador context.

- [Importar maquinaria de EE.UU. a Argentina](https://meridianexport.com/es/blog/import-farm-machinery-united-states-argentina) — AFIDI, SENASA, Sistema Informático Malvina, despachante argentino y tributos de importación
- [Importar maquinaria de EE.UU. a Paraguay](https://meridianexport.com/es/blog/import-farm-machinery-united-states-paraguay) — Ley 7565/2025, DNIT, SENAVE, hidrovía Paraguay-Paraná
- [Importar maquinaria de EE.UU. a Uruguay](https://meridianexport.com/es/blog/import-farm-machinery-united-states-uruguay) — Resolución 98/016, MGAP, DIGESTA, puerto de Montevideo
- [Importar maquinaria de EE.UU. a Bolivia](https://meridianexport.com/es/blog/import-farm-machinery-united-states-bolivia) — SENASAG, rutas terrestres desde Arica e Ilo
- [Importar maquinaria de EE.UU. a Chile](https://meridianexport.com/es/blog/import-farm-machinery-united-states-chile) — SAG, internación, puertos de Arica, San Antonio y Valparaíso

## Services

- [Machinery Dismantling & Container Packing](https://meridianexport.com/services/machinery-packing) — Professional disassembly, tagging, and secure container packing for heavy machinery
- [Container Loading & Export Shipping](https://meridianexport.com/services/container-loading) — Space-optimized loading and international shipping via Maersk, Hapag-Lloyd, CMA CGM
- [Agricultural Equipment Logistics](https://meridianexport.com/services/agricultural) — Specialized handling for combines, tractors, planters, sprayers, and tillage equipment including phytosanitary compliance
- [Export Documentation & Compliance](https://meridianexport.com/services/documentation) — Complete US export paperwork: invoices, packing lists, bills of lading, certificates of origin, phytosanitary certificates
- [Equipment Sourcing & Procurement](https://meridianexport.com/services/equipment-sales) — Locate and inspect used machinery from dealers, auctions, and private sellers across North America
- [Equipment Storage & Warehousing](https://meridianexport.com/services/warehousing) — Secure storage at Iowa HQ and 6 partner warehouses across the USA and Canada

## LATAM Destination Hubs

Spanish-language destination pages for buyers in each country — port routing, import regulations, and how Meridian handles the full chain.

- [Importar a Argentina](https://meridianexport.com/es/destinations/argentina) — AFIDI, Buenos Aires / Rosario routing
- [Importar a Paraguay](https://meridianexport.com/es/destinations/paraguay) — Asunción, hidrovía Paraguay-Paraná
- [Importar a Uruguay](https://meridianexport.com/es/destinations/uruguay) — Montevideo, DGSA
- [Importar a Bolivia](https://meridianexport.com/es/destinations/bolivia) — Santa Cruz, puertos de Arica e Ilo
- [Importar a Chile](https://meridianexport.com/es/destinations/chile) — Arica, San Antonio, Valparaíso
